001/*
002 * Licensed to the Apache Software Foundation (ASF) under one or more
003 * contributor license agreements.  See the NOTICE file distributed with
004 * this work for additional information regarding copyright ownership.
005 * The ASF licenses this file to You under the Apache License, Version 2.0
006 * (the "License"); you may not use this file except in compliance with
007 * the License.  You may obtain a copy of the License at
008 *
009 *      http://www.apache.org/licenses/LICENSE-2.0
010 *
011 * Unless required by applicable law or agreed to in writing, software
012 * distributed under the License is distributed on an "AS IS" BASIS,
013 * WITHOUT WARRANTIES OR CONDITIONS OF ANY KIND, either express or implied.
014 * See the License for the specific language governing permissions and
015 * limitations under the License.
016 */
017package org.apache.juneau.commons.io;
018
019import static org.apache.juneau.commons.collections.CacheMode.*;
020import static org.apache.juneau.commons.utils.AssertionUtils.*;
021import static org.apache.juneau.commons.utils.FileUtils.*;
022import static org.apache.juneau.commons.utils.Shorts.*;
023
024import java.nio.file.*;
025import java.util.*;
026import java.util.concurrent.*;
027
028import org.apache.juneau.commons.collections.*;
029
030/**
031 * A lightweight MIME type detector that doesn't require Jakarta Activation.
032 *
033 * <p>
034 * This class provides MIME type detection using multiple strategies:
035 * <ol>
036 *   <li>Java NIO's {@link Files#probeContentType(Path)} for content-based detection
037 *   <li>Extension-based mapping for common file types
038 *   <li>Configurable MIME type mappings
039 * </ol>
040 *
041 * <p>
042 * This class is thread-safe and can be used as a drop-in replacement for
043 * <c>javax.activation.MimetypesFileTypeMap</c> without requiring Jakarta Activation.
044 *
045 * <h5 class='section'>Example:</h5>
046 * <p class='bjava'>
047 *    <jc>// Basic usage</jc>
048 *    MimeTypeDetector <jv>detector</jv> = MimeTypeDetector.builder().build();
049 *    String <jv>mimeType</jv> = <jv>detector</jv>.getContentType(<js>"document.pdf"</js>);
050 *    <jc>// mimeType = "application/pdf"</jc>
051 *
052 *    <jc>// Custom configuration</jc>
053 *    MimeTypeDetector <jv>custom</jv> = MimeTypeDetector.builder()
054 *       .addExtensionType(<js>"custom"</js>, <js>"application/x-custom"</js>)
055 *       .addTypes(<js>"application/x-foo:foo,bar"</js>)
056 *       .setCacheSize(500)
057 *       .build();
058 * </p>
059 *
060 * <h5 class='section'>See Also:</h5><ul>
061 *    <li class='jm'>{@link Files#probeContentType(Path)}
062 *    <li class='jm'><c>javax.activation.MimetypesFileTypeMap</c> (legacy class, not available in Java 11+)
063 * </ul>
064 */
065@SuppressWarnings({
066   "java:S115" // Constants use UPPER_snakeCase convention
067})
068public class MimeTypeDetector {
069
070   // Argument name constants for assertArgNotNull
071   private static final String ARG_ext = "ext";
072   private static final String ARG_type = "type";
073   private static final String ARG_name = "name";
074
075   /**
076    * Builder class for creating MimeTypeDetector instances.
077    */
078   public static class Builder {
079
080      private final Map<String,String> extMap = new ConcurrentHashMap<>();
081      private final Map<String,String> fileMap = new ConcurrentHashMap<>();
082      private boolean nioContentBasedDetection = true;
083      private int cacheSize = 1000;
084      private CacheMode cacheMode = FULL;
085      private boolean cacheLogOnExit = false;
086      private String defaultType = "application/octet-stream";
087
088      /**
089       * Adds the default MIME type mappings.
090       *
091       * @return This builder.
092       */
093      public Builder addDefaultMappings() {
094         return addTypes("application/epub+zip epub", "application/java-archive jar", "application/javascript js", "application/json json", "application/msword doc", "application/ogg ogx",
095            "application/pdf pdf", "application/rtf rtf", "application/vnd.amazon.ebook azw", "application/vnd.apple.installer+xml mpkg", "application/vnd.mozilla.xul+xml xul",
096            "application/vnd.ms-excel xls", "application/vnd.ms-powerpoint ppt", "application/vnd.oasis.opendocument.presentation odp", "application/vnd.oasis.opendocument.spreadsheet ods",
097            "application/vnd.oasis.opendocument.text odt", "application/vnd.visio vsd", "application/x-7z-compressed 7z", "application/x-abiword abw", "application/x-bzip bz",
098            "application/x-bzip2 bz2", "application/x-csh csh", "application/x-rar-compressed rar", "application/x-sh sh", "application/x-shockwave-flash swf", "application/x-tar tar",
099            "application/xhtml+xml xhtml", "application/xml xml", "application/zip zip", "audio/aac aac", "audio/midi mid midi", "audio/ogg oga", "audio/webm weba", "audio/x-wav wav",
100            "font/ttf ttf", "font/woff woff", "font/woff2 woff2", "image/gif gif", "image/jpeg jpeg jpg", "image/png png", "image/svg+xml svg", "image/tiff tif tiff", "image/webp webp",
101            "image/x-icon ico", "text/calendar ics", "text/css css", "text/csv csv", "text/html htm html", "text/plain txt", "video/3gpp 3gp", "video/3gpp2 3g2", "video/mpeg mpeg",
102            "video/ogg ogv", "video/webm webm", "video/x-msvideo avi");
103      }
104
105      /**
106       * Adds an extension type mapping.
107       *
108       * @param ext The file extension.
109       * @param type The MIME type.
110       * @return This builder.
111       * @throws IllegalArgumentException If ext or type is null or blank.
112       */
113      public Builder addExtensionType(String ext, String type) {
114         assertArgNotNullOrBlank(ARG_ext, ext);
115         assertArgNotNullOrBlank(ARG_type, type);
116         extMap.put(ext.toLowerCase(), type);
117         return this;
118      }
119
120      /**
121       * Adds a file type mapping.
122       *
123       * @param name The file name or path pattern.
124       * @param type The MIME type.
125       * @return This builder.
126       * @throws IllegalArgumentException If name or type is null or blank.
127       */
128      public Builder addFileType(String name, String type) {
129         assertArgNotNullOrBlank(ARG_name, name);
130         assertArgNotNullOrBlank(ARG_type, type);
131         fileMap.put(name, type);
132         return this;
133      }
134
135      /**
136       * Enables or disables NIO content-based detection.
137       *
138       * @param value Whether to enable NIO content-based detection.
139       * @return This builder.
140       */
141      public Builder addNioContentBasedDetection(boolean value) {
142         nioContentBasedDetection = value;
143         return this;
144      }
145
146      /**
147       * Adds MIME type mappings from mime.types file format.
148       *
149       * <p>
150       * Each line should follow the format:
151       * <pre>
152       * text/html        html htm
153       * image/png        png
154       * application/json json
155       * </pre>
156       *
157       * <p>
158       * This method supports both individual lines as varargs and entire
159       * mime.types file contents as a single string (which will be split on newlines).
160       *
161       * @param mimeTypesLines The MIME types lines or file contents.
162       * @return This builder.
163       */
164      @SuppressWarnings({
165         "java:S3776" // Cognitive complexity acceptable for MIME type parsing
166      })
167      public Builder addTypes(String...mimeTypesLines) {
168         for (var input : mimeTypesLines) {
169            if (ine(input)) {
170               // Split on newlines to handle both individual lines and file contents
171               var lines = input.split("\\r?\\n");
172               for (var line : lines) {
173                  if (ine(line) && ! line.trim().startsWith("#")) {
174                     var parts = line.trim().split("\\s+");
175                     if (parts.length >= 2) {
176                        var mimeType = parts[0];
177                        for (var i = 1; i < parts.length; i++) {
178                           addExtensionType(parts[i], mimeType);
179                        }
180                     }
181                  }
182               }
183            }
184         }
185         return this;
186      }
187
188      /**
189       * Builds the MimeTypeDetector instance.
190       *
191       * @return A new MimeTypeDetector instance.
192       */
193      public MimeTypeDetector build() {
194         return new MimeTypeDetector(this);
195      }
196
197      /**
198       * Enables or disables cache logging on exit.
199       *
200       * @param value Whether to log cache statistics on exit.
201       * @return This builder.
202       */
203      public Builder setCacheLogOnExit(boolean value) {
204         cacheLogOnExit = value;
205         return this;
206      }
207
208      /**
209       * Sets the caching mode for MIME type lookups.
210       *
211       * <p>
212       * Available modes:
213       * <ul>
214       *    <li>{@link CacheMode#NONE NONE} - No caching (always recompute)
215       *    <li>{@link CacheMode#WEAK WEAK} - Weak caching (uses {@link WeakHashMap})
216       *    <li>{@link CacheMode#FULL FULL} - Full caching (uses {@link ConcurrentHashMap}, default)
217       * </ul>
218       *
219       * @param value The caching mode.
220       * @return This builder.
221       */
222      public Builder setCacheMode(CacheMode value) {
223         cacheMode = value;
224         return this;
225      }
226
227      /**
228       * Sets the cache size.
229       *
230       * @param value The maximum cache size.
231       * @return This builder.
232       */
233      public Builder setCacheSize(int value) {
234         cacheSize = value;
235         return this;
236      }
237
238      /**
239       * Sets the default MIME type for unknown files.
240       *
241       * @param value The default MIME type.
242       * @return This builder.
243       */
244      public Builder setDefaultType(String value) {
245         defaultType = value;
246         return this;
247      }
248   }
249
250   /**
251    * Default MIME type detector instance.
252    */
253   public static final MimeTypeDetector DEFAULT = builder().addDefaultMappings().build();
254
255   /**
256    * Creates a new builder for MimeTypeDetector.
257    *
258    * @return A new builder.
259    */
260   public static Builder builder() {
261      return new Builder();
262   }
263
264   private final Map<String,String> extMap;
265   private final Map<String,String> fileMap;
266   private final Cache<String,String> cache;
267   private final boolean nioContentBasedDetection;
268   private final String defaultType;
269
270   /**
271    * Constructor.
272    *
273    * @param builder The builder.
274    */
275   private MimeTypeDetector(Builder builder) {
276      this.extMap = new ConcurrentHashMap<>(builder.extMap);
277      this.fileMap = new ConcurrentHashMap<>(builder.fileMap);
278      this.nioContentBasedDetection = builder.nioContentBasedDetection;
279      this.defaultType = builder.defaultType;
280
281      // Create cache for file-based lookups
282      var cacheBuilder = Cache.of(String.class, String.class).maxSize(builder.cacheSize).cacheMode(builder.cacheMode);
283
284      if (builder.cacheLogOnExit) {
285         cacheBuilder.logOnExit("MimeTypeDetector");
286      }
287
288      this.cache = cacheBuilder.build();
289   }
290
291   /**
292    * Clears the MIME type cache.
293    *
294    * <p>
295    * This method can be called to free memory or when you want to ensure
296    * fresh MIME type detection (e.g., after files have been modified).
297    */
298   public void clearCache() {
299      cache.clear();
300   }
301
302   /**
303    * Returns the number of cache hits since the cache was created.
304    *
305    * @return The number of cache hits.
306    */
307   public int getCacheHits() { return cache.getCacheHits(); }
308
309   /**
310    * Returns the current cache size.
311    *
312    * @return The number of cached MIME type entries.
313    */
314   public int getCacheSize() { return cache.size(); }
315
316   /**
317    * Determines the MIME type of a file based on its name or path.
318    *
319    * <p>
320    * This method uses multiple strategies to determine the MIME type:
321    * <ol>
322    *   <li>Checks cache first for previously determined MIME types
323    *   <li>If the file exists, uses {@link Files#probeContentType(Path)} for content-based detection
324    *   <li>Falls back to extension-based mapping for common file types
325    *   <li>Returns the configured default type for unknown types
326    * </ol>
327    *
328    * <p>
329    * Results are cached to improve performance for repeated lookups of the same files.
330    *
331    * @param fileName The name or path of the file.
332    * @return The MIME type of the file, or the default type if unknown.
333    */
334   public String getContentType(String fileName) {
335      if (ie(fileName)) {
336         return defaultType;
337      }
338
339      // Check file map first (for specific file mappings)
340      var fileMimeType = fileMap.get(fileName);
341      if (nn(fileMimeType)) {
342         return fileMimeType;
343      }
344
345      // Use cache with supplier for automatic cache management
346      return cache.get(fileName, () -> determineMimeType(fileName));
347   }
348
349   /**
350    * Determines the MIME type without caching (internal method).
351    *
352    * @param fileName The name or path of the file.
353    * @return The MIME type of the file.
354    */
355   private String determineMimeType(String fileName) {
356      // Try Java NIO's content-based detection first
357      if (nioContentBasedDetection) {
358         try {
359            var path = Paths.get(fileName);
360            if (Files.exists(path)) {
361               var contentType = Files.probeContentType(path);
362               if (ine(contentType)) {
363                  return contentType;
364               }
365         }
366         } catch (@SuppressWarnings("unused") Exception e) {
367         // Fall back to extension-based detection
368         }
369      }
370
371      // Fall back to extension-based detection
372      var extension = getFileExtension(fileName);
373      if (ine(extension)) {
374         var mimeType = extMap.get(extension.toLowerCase());
375         if (nn(mimeType)) {
376            return mimeType;
377         }
378      }
379
380      // Default fallback
381      return defaultType;
382   }
383}
